// Features

Logging doesn't have to be hard.
We made it easier.

Automatic Uploads

Finish an activation and your logs automagically upload to pota.app and QRZ — no exporting, no copy-pasting, no fuss.

Performance Metrics

Total QSOs, bands worked, states, parks activated, and more — all beautifully tracked so you can see how far you've come.

Stay Connected With Friends

See when friends are on the air, what band they're working, and a live feed of their sessions and activations. Ham radio is better together.

Experience the Command Bar

A powerful, keyboard-driven command bar puts every action a keystroke away — search, log, spot, and navigate without lifting your eyes from the rig.

POTA & SOTA Logging

Log park and summit activations with automatic reference lookup, one-tap spot posting to pota.app, P2P contact support, and instant upload when you're done. Built for the field, optimized for the operator.

ADIF Import / Export

Round-trip your logs with Clublog, eQSL, and LOTW via QRZ — all standards-compliant, no lock-in. Already using PoLo or HamRS? Import your existing files and pick up right where you left off.

// Works With
